name: Clemar Assessoria e Logística em Comércio Internacional
message: [AI generated] Clemar Assessoria e Logística em Comércio Internacional is a Brazilian company specializing in international trade and logistic services. With extensive experience in the sector, it provides assistance in customs clearance, export and import processes, freight forwarding, and international business consultancy. The company aims to facilitate and simplify foreign trade operations for businesses of all sizes.
